context: Tests whether the agent follows all shopify-theme-clone skill steps: discovering themes with theme list, pulling with theme pull, initializing git with -b main, adding correct .gitignore entries, using the correct commit message format, verifying with ls, and providing the correct dev/push commands with --allow-live warning.

checklist.name: shopify theme list command present
checklist.description: theme-setup-guide.md includes the command 'shopify theme list --store=trailgear.myshopify.com' (or equivalent with --store flag) to discover available themes

checklist.name: MAIN/live theme identification explained
checklist.description: Guide explains that the MAIN role indicates the live theme and that UNPUBLISHED indicates a draft/preview theme — so the developer knows which to clone

checklist.name: shopify theme pull command with --store and --theme
checklist.description: theme-setup-guide.md includes 'shopify theme pull --store=trailgear.myshopify.com --theme=<id>' (or equivalent with both --store and --theme flags)

checklist.name: git init -b main used
checklist.description: theme-setup-guide.md uses 'git init -b main' (with -b main flag) — NOT plain 'git init' without the -b flag

checklist.name: .gitignore includes .env
checklist.description: .gitignore setup in the guide includes '.env' as an entry

checklist.name: .gitignore includes .shopify
checklist.description: .gitignore setup in the guide includes '.shopify' as an entry

checklist.name: .gitignore includes node_modules/
checklist.description: .gitignore setup in the guide includes 'node_modules/' as an entry

checklist.name: .gitignore includes generated/
checklist.description: .gitignore setup in the guide includes 'generated/' as an entry

checklist.name: Commit message format correct
checklist.description: The guide's initial commit message follows the format 'Initial commit: cloned theme <theme-name> from <store>' — not just 'initial commit' or a generic message

checklist.name: Verification step with ls present
checklist.description: Guide includes a verification step using 'ls config templates sections' (or equivalent ls command targeting those directories) to confirm the pull succeeded

checklist.name: shopify theme dev command present
checklist.description: Guide includes 'shopify theme dev --store=trailgear.myshopify.com --theme=<id>' for local preview

checklist.name: --allow-live warning for MAIN theme
checklist.description: Guide explicitly warns that pushing to the MAIN (live) theme requires --allow-live flag and will immediately update the storefront — and recommends pushing to an unpublished theme first for risky changes
